raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am filing this complaint to report an unresolved issue regarding a duplicate charge on my American Express credit card that occurred on XX/XX/year>, for which I have not received a refund despite repeated efforts. 

On that date, I attempted to make a {$500.00} payment through a merchant. The first attempt was declined. However, XXXX subsequent transactions for {$500.00} each were both successfully processed. This is clearly reflected in my credit card statement, which shows XXXX completed {$500.00} charges on XX/XX/year>, totaling {$1000.00}. 

Upon noticing the duplicate charge, I contacted the merchant. The merchant acknowledged the issue but claimed that only XXXX of the charges was deposited into their account and that they are not the payment processorthey use Stripe. They advised me to reach out to Stripe directly. However, XXXX will not speak with me, as I am not their direct customer ; the merchant is. 

I then contacted American Express to dispute the charge, but due to the time that had passed, they were unwilling or unable to process the dispute. 

I provided the merchant with a copy of my credit card statement showing both charges clearly marked as completed. I also offered to do a three-way call with American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX that both payments went through. Still, the merchant insists that they did not receive the second {$500.00}, and they have not taken further steps to resolve the matter. 

As a consumer, I am caught in the middle between the credit card company, the merchant, and the payment processor, with none of them taking responsibility. This has left me with a {$500.00} loss for a duplicate charge I did not authorize or benefit from. 

I respectfully request the CFPBs assistance in helping me secure a refund for the second {$500.00} charge or holding the responsible party accountable. I am happy to provide documentation including my credit card statement and correspondence with the merchant upon request. 

Thank you for your time and assistance. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
